HomeLearning LibraryOverview & FreebiesAI Coding BasicsEvents
D

Blocks

Pre-built components and layouts for your applications

Dashboard
A comprehensive dashboard layout with stats cards, charts, recent activity, and data tables. Perfect for admin panels and analytics views.
layoutchartsstatsadmin
Mail
A full-featured email interface with folder sidebar, message list, and reading pane. Supports inbox, sent, drafts, and archived folders.
emailinboxcommunication
Authentication
Complete authentication flows including login, register, forgot password, and account verification. Multiple layout variations available.
authloginsecurity
Tasks
A Kanban-style task management board with drag-and-drop support. Organize tasks into columns like To Do, In Progress, and Done.
kanbanproject-managementproductivity
Cards
A collection of card component patterns for displaying content. Includes stat cards, user profile cards, pricing cards, and media cards.
uicontentdisplay
Playground
An interactive component playground for testing and previewing UI components. Real-time editing with live preview.
demointeractivetesting
Forms
Advanced form layouts with validation, multi-step wizards, and various input types. Built with react-hook-form and zod validation.
formsinputvalidation
Music
A music player interface with playlist view, album art, playback controls, and volume slider. Inspired by modern streaming apps.
mediaplayerentertainment
